name: Bridge cvc5 Cross-Check of Z3 Kernel Ordering Proofs

z3.reason: Supportive: reference implementation for comparison; same 4 proofs run in z3 to confirm cvc5 agreement

cvc5.reason: Load-bearing: independent UNSAT proof solver; each of 4 kernel ordering proofs run through cvc5 QF_NRA

proof1_entangled_implies_MI_positive.description: Entangled state (off-diagonal > 0, joint entropy < marginal) must have I(A:B) > 0. Forbidden: I(A:B) <= 0.
proof1_entangled_implies_MI_positive.note: UNSAT: cvc5 confirms forbidden configuration is impossible — proof holds.

proof2_coherent_info_strictly_weaker_tha.description: Coherent information I_c = S(B) - S(AB) < I(A:B) = S(A) + S(B) - S(AB). Forbidden: I_c > I(A:B).
proof2_coherent_info_strictly_weaker_tha.note: UNSAT: cvc5 confirms forbidden configuration is impossible — proof holds.

proof3_separable_kernel_ordering_CE_ge_I.description: For separable states (S_AB >= S_B, i.e. CE >= 0): CE >= I_c. Forbidden: CE < I_c.
proof3_separable_kernel_ordering_CE_ge_I.note: UNSAT: cvc5 confirms forbidden configuration is impossible — proof holds.

proof4_product_state_zero_MI.description: Product state (S_AB = S_A + S_B) must have I(A:B) = 0. Forbidden: I(A:B) > 0.
proof4_product_state_zero_MI.note: UNSAT: cvc5 confirms forbidden configuration is impossible — proof holds.

sat_check_entangled_state_has_positive_M.description: Entangled state with I(A:B) > 0 should be SAT (valid config exists)
sat_check_entangled_state_has_positive_M.note: SAT expected — confirms positive proof space is non-empty.

sat_check_product_state_zero_MI_satisfia.description: Product state with I(A:B) = 0 should be SAT
sat_check_product_state_zero_MI_satisfia.note: SAT expected — product states with zero MI do exist.

boundary_maximally_mixed_CE_ge_Ic.description: Maximally mixed state: CE=1, I_c=-1. CE < I_c should be UNSAT.
boundary_maximally_mixed_CE_ge_Ic.note: UNSAT expected: CE=1 >= I_c=-1 at maximally mixed boundary.

boundary_maximally_mixed_MI_lt_CE_is_SAT.description: Maximally mixed state: MI=0, CE=1. MI < CE should be SAT.
boundary_maximally_mixed_MI_lt_CE_is_SAT.note: SAT expected: MI < CE is achievable at the maximally mixed boundary.
